# Bryan Develops

> Freelance web developer and software engineer based in South Bend, Indiana. I help small businesses and startups build websites, custom software, and improve their SEO.

## About
- Name: Bryan Arambula
- Business: Bryan Develops
- Location: South Bend, IN (serving clients nationwide)
- Website: https://bryandevelops.com
- Contact: https://bryandevelops.com/contact

## Services
- [Web Development](https://bryandevelops.com/services/web-development): Professional websites on WordPress, Shopify, Squarespace, Wix, or custom code. Training included.
- [Custom Software](https://bryandevelops.com/services/software): Workflow automation, AI chatbots, dashboards, and custom platforms.
- [SEO Services](https://bryandevelops.com/services/seo): Keyword research, on-page optimization, local SEO, and ongoing strategy.
